signupData.goalsElaboration: Recovering from ACL surgery (9 months post-op). Want to get back to playing soccer and rebuild leg strength.
signupData.locationElaboration: University rec center - standard gym equipment
signupData.injuries: ACL reconstruction (right knee), 9 months post-op. Still doing PT. Nervous about re-injury.

onboardingMessages: I had ACL surgery about 9 months ago and I'm trying to get back to playing soccer
I go to the university rec center, they have standard gym stuff
I'm still doing physical therapy and I'm pretty nervous about pushing too hard on my knee
